reviews.comment:
Casi siempre cargo combustible allí, los chicos de la playa atienen  muy bien, y el servicio es rápido

(Translated by Google)
I almost always fill up there; the guys at the gas station are very helpful, and the service is fast.

reviews.comment:
Tenía una cafetería excelente,  hasta que cambió de concesión y se volvió cara y vulgar.  Ahora directamente está cerrada.  Ojalá vuelva la vieja concesión.

(Translated by Google)
It had an excellent coffee shop, until the concession changed and it became expensive and vulgar. Now it's completely closed. I hope the old concession comes back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVNllqbHh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Una parada obligada para repostar combustible. Baños super limpios y buen bar con menú de medio dia.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop for refueling. Super clean restrooms and a good bar with a lunch menu.
